calendar.matters:
Pltf'S Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Settlement Against Defts
Off Calendar May-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Ann Rankin, Esq. 510/653-8886 for pltf & moving party; Peter L. Levy, Esq. 391-5270 for deft & opposing party William L. Ferdon III.
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the motion to enforce settlement, denies request for fees, issues judgment, and stays for 30 days. Order signed in open court. (AJR/CW)

Pltf'S Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Settlement Against Defts
Off Calendar May-07-2002 Continued To May-23-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Peter L. Levy, Esq. 391-5270 for deft & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 05/23/02. Counsel to give notice.
